description: Create a C4 Model architecture diagram for GitLab's core platform based on the specification provided at ~/Desktop/gitlab_architecture_spec.txt. The diagram must consist of two pages: a System Context (Level 1) diagram showing the User, CI Runner, GitLab System, Email Server, and LDAP; and a Container Diagram (Level 2) showing the internal components (Workhorse, Puma, Sidekiq, Gitaly, etc.) and their protocols (HTTPS, gRPC, TCP, etc.) as described in the spec. Save the diagram to ~/Desktop/gitlab_c4_diagram.drawio and export the Container Diagram (Page 2) as a PNG image to ~/Desktop/gitlab_c4_diagram.png. The diagram must contain the specific component names listed in the specification file.
